title: Tama and the Alliance Shift the Battle
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Momonosuke as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But his mannerisms, the way he talks...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're the only ones who knew open...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was meant to take care of Kanjuro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Even the sharpest sword becomes dull.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This fight is as personal as it gets!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: KAKAKA... controlling this remotely is exhausting.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't live to see the end of this war anyway!! I've already been severely wounded.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Before I die, I will plunge a dagger into the heart of the Kouzuki clan!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's right, that voice from earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It said momonosuke- Sama was with a kunoichi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have to find a way to warn her!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, it's foul play to go after a dying opponent!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Your mystery of Kozuki! Open ends here!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 39 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
